form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 5.5 lengths third at Warragul but did record a fast 22.70 over the 400m trip. Looms as the one to beat this time.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start easily by 4 lengths at Bendigo (24.30) beating High Five Indi in a T3 RSTW on April 2. Racing well and can win again.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 0.8 lengths second at Warragul but did record a brilliant 25.81 over the 460m journey. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last five starts. Last time out finished 3rd over 400m at Warragul beaten 6 lengths (23.04) behind Dr. Zaiden in a Mix 6/7 on April 7. Likely to find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 24.56 when second at this track latest but the run prior he clocked an excellent 22.52 over 400m finishing second at Warragul. Top run two back and has claims here.

form.formComment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to score by a 0.8 lengths in a Mix 6/7 last start at Warragul, recording a blistering 22.59 over the 400m journey. Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (23.52) over 410m at Horsham. Wide draw here. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led for much of the way before being grabbed late, finishing a 1.3 lengths second at this track over 435m in 24.61. Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth on March 31 over 460m at Warragul behind Moment, beaten 8 lengths (26.68) in a Restricted WIN. Not keen, needs to lift.
